'''Viqi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Deltron (species)|Deltron]] and one of [[Brisha Shard]]'s [[Youngling/Legends|children]]. She had a brother, [[Alarik]], and a sister, [[Bellen]].<ref name="Skyewalkers" />

==Appearances==
*''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]'' {{1stm}}
